channel.title: New Streaming TV Shows
channel.description: Latest notable TV releases from major streaming services

item.title: Teach You a Lesson
item.description:
Platform: Netflix
First Air Date: 2026-06-05

An inspector from the Educational Rights Protection Bureau (ERPB) who is authorized by the government to use physical intervention and unconventional methods to discipline delinquent students and reform the educational system.

item.title: The Polygamist
item.description:
Platform: Netflix
First Air Date: 2026-06-12

Social media darling, Joyce, is the picture of marital perfection — until her cheating husband's conquests ignite a scandalous emotional meltdown.

item.title: Elle
item.description:
Platform: Prime Video
First Air Date: 2026-07-01

Before Elle Woods was a fish-out-of-water at Harvard, we meet her in 1995 in the tumultuous waters of high school where she encounters tricky friendships, forbidden romance, and questionable fashion choices. In this unexpected chapter of her adolescence, we learn about the experiences that shaped Elle into the iconic young woman we've come to know and love.

item.title: Cape Fear
item.description:
Platform: Apple TV+
First Air Date: 2026-06-04

When convicted murderer Max Cady is released from prison, he begins infiltrating the family of the married attorneys who helped put him behind bars.
